internal_issues.description: WIN-058 undefined on dome's site — only a one-line listing with no equations, derivation, or mechanism
Argument 'coordinate choice is convention' proves too much — need physical distinction
Torge & Müller citation missing context about WGS84 being independently measured
No engagement with 0.9941 parameter origin — need to show it's least-squares fit
15-20 nT/yr claim needed derivation and tighter citation
Summary finding focused on NH regression rather than dome's actual claim
Post-glacial rebound explanation incomplete — need mantle plume + multiple mechanisms
PRED-NEW-001 post-hoc timing not mentioned — registered after data well-known
Combined error budget not presented — +0.27° within noise
